╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Help · Users List                                                                                                                       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Press Esc to close                                                                                                                      │
│                                                                                                                                         │
│ ── Resource ──                         ── General ──                       ── Navigation ──                                             │
│ Enter / d        open detail (all attributes)  :       open command palette                j / k            cursor down / up            │
│ Shift+S          sort by STATUS                /       incremental search (lists)          h / l            scroll columns left / right │
│ Shift+N          sort by NAME (login)          ?       this help                           gg / G           top / bottom                │
│ Shift+L          sort by LAST LOGIN            Esc     cancel mode / close overlay         Ctrl-d / Ctrl-u  half-page down / up         │
│ Shift+C          sort by CREATED / CHANGED     q       close screen / quit (with confirm)  Ctrl-f / Ctrl-b  page down / up              │
│ :reset-password  send reset-password email     Ctrl-c  soft quit (tail confirm)                                                         │
│ :unlock          clear LOCKED_OUT state        Ctrl-l  force redraw                                                                     │
│ :reset-mfa       remove enrolled MFA factors   R       refresh (cache invalidate)                                                       │
│                                                :quit   quit ota                                                                         │
│                                                                                                                                         │
│ <Esc> close · </> filter                                                                                                                │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
